member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.AppRole
member.summary: アプリケーションの権限ロール。

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.AppRole.User
member.summary: 通常ユーザー（同期状況の閲覧のみ）。

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.AppRole.Administrator
member.summary: 管理者（ユーザー管理・設定変更が可能）。

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ChangeDetectionMethod
member.summary: Method for detecting changes

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ChangeDetectionMethod.Polling
member.summary: Polling based on UpdatedTime comparison

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ConflictResolutionStrategy
member.summary: Strategy for resolving sync conflicts

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ConflictResolutionStrategy.SourceWins
member.summary: Source (parent) data always wins

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ConflictResolutionStrategy.LastWriteWins
member.summary: Most recent update wins (by UpdatedTime)

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ConflictResolutionStrategy.ManualResolution
member.summary: Log conflict for manual resolution

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ConflictResolutionStrategy.FieldLevelMerge
member.summary: Compare each column's last update time and merge at field level

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.DbmsType
member.summary: RDBMS type

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ReferenceType
member.summary: Pleasanter table reference type

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.SyncStatus
member.summary: Status of a sync operation

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.TopologyType
member.summary: Sync topology type

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.TopologyType.HubSpoke
member.summary: Hub-Spoke (parent-child) topology

member.name: F:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.TopologyType.PeerToPeer
member.summary: Peer-to-Peer topology

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository
member.summary: Repository for managing application users.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all users.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a user by ID.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.GetByUsernameAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a user by username (case-insensitive).

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.CreateAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new user.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.UpdateAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing user.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.DeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a user by ID.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IAppUserRepository.AnyUsersExistAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether any users exist in the database.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IPleasanterDbAccess
member.summary: Interface for direct database access to Pleasanter tables.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IPleasanterDbAccess.GetReferenceTypeAsync(System.String,VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.DbmsType,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Determines the reference type (Results or Issues) for a given site.
Gets records that have been modified since the specified time.
Gets records that have been deleted since the specified time.
Finds a record in the target by sync key values.
Inserts or updates a record in the target instance.
Deletes a record from the target instance (moving it to _deleted table first).

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IPleasanterDbAccess.TestConnectionAsync(System.String,VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.DbmsType,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests a database connection.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository
member.summary: Repository for managing sync configuration data.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.GetAllInstancesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all sync instances.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.GetInstanceByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a sync instance by its ID.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.CreateInstanceAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new sync instance.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.UpdateInstanceAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing sync instance.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.DeleteInstanceAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a sync instance by its ID.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.GetAllDefinitionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all sync definitions.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.GetEnabledDefinitionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all enabled sync definitions.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.GetDefinitionByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a sync definition by its ID.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.CreateDefinitionAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new sync definition.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.UpdateDefinitionAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing sync definition.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.DeleteDefinitionAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a sync definition by its ID.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.GetRecentLogsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the most recent sync log entries.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.CreateLogEntryAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new sync log entry.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository.UpdateLogEntryAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing sync log entry.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncEngine
member.summary: Interface for the sync engine that orchestrates data synchronization.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncEngine.ExecuteSyncAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a single sync cycle for a given definition.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository
member.summary: Repository for managing record version history.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository.CreateAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new version history entry.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository.GetNextVersionNumberAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the next version number for a specific record.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository.GetByRecordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets version history entries for a specific record, ordered by version number descending.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository.DeleteExcessVersionsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes version history entries that exceed the maximum version count for a specific record. Returns the number of entries deleted.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository.DeleteOlderThanAsync(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes version history entries older than the specified cutoff date for a given sync definition. Returns the number of entries deleted.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser
member.summary: Represents an application user for management web authentication.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the login username.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.PasswordHash
member.summary: Gets or sets the PBKDF2 password hash (format: "base64salt:base64hash").

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.Role
member.summary: Gets or sets the user's role.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.MustChangePassword
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the user must change their password at next login.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation timestamp.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.AppUser.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the last update timestamp.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord
member.summary: Represents a record from a Pleasanter Results or Issues table.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.RecordId
member.summary: Gets or sets the record ID (ResultId or IssueId).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.SiteId
member.summary: Gets or sets the site ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.Ver
member.summary: Gets or sets the version number.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.Body
member.summary: Gets or sets the body.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.Creator
member.summary: Gets or sets the creator user ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.Updator
member.summary: Gets or sets the last updater user ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.CreatedTime
member.summary: Gets or sets when the record was created.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.UpdatedTime
member.summary: Gets or sets when the record was last updated.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.Locked
member.summary: Gets or sets the locked state (Wikis only).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.ColumnValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the column values (ClassA-ClassZ, NumA-NumZ, DateA-DateZ, DescriptionA-DescriptionZ).

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.GetColumnValue(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the value of a specific column.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets whether the record was deleted (exists in _deleted table).

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory
member.summary: Represents a version history snapshot of a Pleasanter record captured before a sync overwrite.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.SyncId
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync definition ID that triggered this snapshot.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.InstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance ID where this snapshot was captured.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.SiteId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pleasanter site ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.RecordId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pleasanter record ID (ResultId or IssueId).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.VersionNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the sequential version number for this record's history (1-based).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the record title at the time of snapshot.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.Body
member.summary: Gets or sets the record body at the time of snapshot.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.ColumnSnapshotJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the column values as a JSON-serialized snapshot.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.ChangedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pleasanter user ID who last edited the record before this snapshot.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.ChangedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the Pleasanter UpdatedTime of the record at snapshot time.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.IsDeleteSnapshot
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this snapshot was captured before a deletion (true) or an update (false).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.RecordVersionHistory.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this version history entry was created.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition
member.summary: Represents a sync definition that configures how data is synchronized between Pleasanter instances.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SyncId
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync definition identifier (e.g., "master-employee").

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets a description of this sync definition.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.Topology
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync topology type.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.ConflictResolution
member.summary: Gets or sets the conflict resolution strategy.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.ChangeDetectionMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the change detection method.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.PollingIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the polling interval in seconds.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SyncUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync user ID used in Pleasanter.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SyncUserName
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync user name.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SourceInstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the source instance ID (FK).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SourceInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the source instance.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SourceSiteId
member.summary: Gets or sets the source site ID in Pleasanter.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this sync definition is enabled.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.SyncKeyColumns
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync key columns (comma-separated, e.g., "ClassA").

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.IncludeColumns
member.summary: Gets or sets the default included columns (comma-separated).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.ExcludeColumns
member.summary: Gets or sets the default excluded columns (comma-separated).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.RecordFilterInclude
member.summary: Gets or sets the record filter include conditions as JSON (e.g., {"ClassB": "approved"}).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.RecordFilterExclude
member.summary: Gets or sets the record filter exclude conditions as JSON (e.g., {"ClassC": "confidential"}).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.AttachmentsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether attachment (Binaries) sync is enabled.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.AttachmentsStorageType
member.summary: Gets or sets the attachment storage type (only "Rds" is supported).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.TargetMappings
member.summary: Gets or sets the target mappings.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation timestamp.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the last update timestamp.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.VersionHistoryEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether version history is enabled for this sync definition.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.VersionHistoryMaxVersions
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of versions to retain per record. When null, no version count limit is applied. Default is 20.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.VersionHistoryMaxDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of days to retain version history. When null, no age limit is applied. Default is 180 days.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.GetSyncKeyColumnList
member.summary: Gets the sync key column names as a list.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.GetIncludeColumnList
member.summary: Gets the include column names as a list.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition.GetExcludeColumnList
member.summary: Gets the exclude column names as a list.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance
member.summary: Represents a Pleasanter instance with its database connection information.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.InstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance identifier (e.g., "headquarters", "branch-a").

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets a display name for this instance.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.DbmsType
member.summary: Gets or sets the RDBMS type.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the database connection string.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation timestamp.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncInstance.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the last update timestamp.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry
member.summary: Represents a log entry for a sync operation.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.SyncId
member.summary: Gets or sets the sync definition ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.SourceInstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the source instance ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.TargetInstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the target instance ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the status of this sync operation.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.RecordsProcessed
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of records processed.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.RecordsInserted
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of records inserted.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.RecordsUpdated
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of records updated.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.RecordsDeleted
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of records deleted.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.ConflictsDetected
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of conflicts detected.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message if the sync failed.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.StartedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the sync operation started.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncLogEntry.CompletedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the sync operation completed.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping
member.summary: Maps a sync definition to a target instance with direction and column overrides.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.SyncDefinitionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent sync definition ID.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.SyncDefinition
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent sync definition.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.TargetInstanceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the target instance ID (FK).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.TargetInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the target instance.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.TargetSiteId
member.summary: Gets or sets the target site ID in Pleasanter.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.SourceToTargetEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether source-to-target sync is enabled.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.TargetToSourceEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether target-to-source sync is enabled.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.TargetToSourceExcludeColumns
member.summary: Gets or sets columns excluded from target-to-source sync (comma-separated).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.TargetExcludeColumns
member.summary: Gets or sets columns excluded for this specific target (comma-separated).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.RecordFilterIncludeOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets the record filter include override for this target as JSON.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping.RecordFilterExcludeOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets the record filter exclude override for this target as JSON.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.SyncEngine
member.summary: Orchestrates data synchronization between Pleasanter instances.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.SyncRuleEngine
member.summary: Applies sync rules to filter columns and control direction.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.SyncRuleEngine.GetEffectiveColumns(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncTargetMapping,VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Enums.ReferenceType)
member.summary: Gets the list of columns to sync for a specific target, taking into account the definition's include/exclude lists and the target's override excludes.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.SyncRuleEngine.FilterRecordColumns(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Filters source record columns to only include the effective columns.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.SyncRuleEngine.GetAllPleasanterDataColumns
member.summary: Gets all standard Pleasanter data columns (ClassA-ClassZ, NumA-NumZ, DateA-DateZ, DescriptionA-DescriptionZ).

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.SyncRuleEngine.GetWikiDataColumns
member.summary: Gets Wiki-specific data columns (Title and Body only — Wikis have no Class/Num/Date/Description columns).

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService
member.summary: Manages record version history creation and retention cleanup.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService.#ctor(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.IVersionHistoryRepository,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService.CaptureSnapshotAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.String,System.Int64,VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Captures a snapshot of the existing target record before it is overwritten by a sync operation.
member.param: The sync definition with version history settings.
The instance ID where the record resides.
The existing record to snapshot (before overwrite).
member.returns: The created version history entry, or null if version history is disabled.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService.CaptureDeleteSnapshotAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.String,System.Int64,VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.PleasanterRecord,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Captures a snapshot of the existing target record before it is deleted by a sync operation.
member.param: The sync definition with version history settings.
The instance ID where the record resides.
The existing record to snapshot (before deletion).
member.returns: The created version history entry, or null if version history is disabled.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService.ApplyRetentionForRecordAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies retention policy for a specific record after a new version is captured. Enforces the "earlier of" logic: versions exceeding maxVersions OR older than maxDays are deleted.
member.param: The sync definition with retention settings.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Services.VersionHistoryService.ApplyTimeBasedRetentionAsync(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Models.SyncDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies time-based retention cleanup for an entire sync definition. This should be called periodically (e.g., after each sync cycle).
member.param: The sync definition with retention settings.
